subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! When the realms of creation were enveloped by layers of darkness and veils of impenetrable gloom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی لما اخذت الاکوان سبحات الظلما و حجبات المظلمه الدهماء اخرجت
subcodes.subjects: @nearness and remoteness, @transcending the material condition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation
